summary: Advanced the runnable CPMG follow-up for accepted branch reimage1804_c02. Authored and recorded an explicit CPMG N=8 weak-13C discriminator model/intent around f13=384.6 kHz, tau targets 0.650 and 1.300 us, tau scan 0.45..1.60 us with 37 points and 12 x 50000 reps. Parsed verifier JSON (verdict verified, no hard errors/blockers/warnings), confirmed bridge idle before enqueue, and used the single-submit MATLAB advisory (ok=true, no blockers, estimated per-average 536.2 s under active 900 s nighttime cap). The execute materialized as bridge job nv23_cpmg_20260515_072306_auto_cpmg and is running. A one-average autosave was raw-exported bridge-free: CPMG.xml, one saved average x 50000 reps, snake scan order, three readouts matching expected roles. The provisional one-average review found no obvious readout3 target-tau dip and noted a readout2 reference caveat near 1.312 us; no 13C claim or rejection was made. Final wake check showed this CPMG job as the only running bridge job, queued/staging empty, monitor active, no last_error, stop_requested=false, and Final about 44.318 kcps. State, evidence ledger, lab log, notes, figures, and status artifacts were updated.

next_action.reason: Bridge-touching work is blocked while the CPMG N=8 weak-13C discriminator is running. Continue monitor/cron checks until terminal success/failure or hard anomaly evidence. Bridge-free review of a later even-average autosave is allowed only if useful; mark it provisional.
next_action.on_terminal_success: Raw-export the savedexperiment, verify saved metadata/readout roles, run scan-order-aware drift, plot raw readouts plus signal-self-baseline and reference-aware views, inspect target tau regions near 0.650 us and 1.300 us plus off-target baselines/references, then complete the verified CPMG experiment intent and update the T2star/13C conclusions conservatively.
next_action.on_terminal_failure: Preserve result/status/control/logs, distinguish hardware/route/monitor/code failure from count/tracking/scientific evidence, and do not infer a 13C rejection from a failed execute before valid data.
